instanceExperimentalSettings.heading: Experimental
instanceExperimentalSettings.pageDescription: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimentalSettings.enableEnvironmentsDesc: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
instanceExperimentalSettings.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimentalSettings.cloudSyncDesc: Show local Paperclip Cloud upstream connection, preview, push, retry, and activation review surfaces. Saved connections and run history are preserved when this is disabled.
instanceExperimentalSettings.autoRestartDevDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
instanceExperimentalSettings.autoCreateRecoveryDesc: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
instanceExperimentalSettings.lookbackInvalid: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.
instanceExperimentalSettings.noRecoveryTasksNow: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
instanceExperimentalSettings.skippedOutsideLookback: {{count}} current {{verbPhrase}} outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.

instanceGeneralSettings.heading: General
instanceGeneralSettings.pageDescription: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
instanceGeneralSettings.deploymentLocalTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
instanceGeneralSettings.deploymentPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
instanceGeneralSettings.deploymentPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
instanceGeneralSettings.censorUsernameDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceGeneralSettings.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneralSettings.backupRetentionDesc: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
instanceGeneralSettings.aiFeedbackSharingDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneralSettings.retestPromptHintBefore: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the
instanceGeneralSettings.retestPromptHintMiddle2: JSON row for this instance, or set it back to
instanceGeneralSettings.retestPromptHintAfter2: both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instanceGeneralSettings.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

instanceAccess.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.
instanceAccess.adminRequired: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
instanceAccess.companyAccessDesc: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.

emptyState.description: Revision 1 is the only history this routine has. Saving an edit creates the first additional revision.

historicalBanner.description: Restoring this revision creates a new revision {{n}} with the same content. History stays append-only.

routineHistory.webhookSecretsNote: Webhook secrets are not stored in revisions. If a restored webhook trigger needs re-creation, Paperclip mints fresh secret material at restore time.

restoreDialog.title: Restore revision {{n}}?
restoreDialog.description: This creates a new revision {{newN}} with the same content as revision {{targetN}}. Revisions {{targetN}}–{{currentN}} stay in history and are not modified.
restoreDialog.fieldsRevert: Routine field values, variables, and schedule cron will revert.
restoreDialog.webhookRecreated: The webhook trigger {{label}} will be recreated with a new URL and secret. Paperclip will show the secret once after restore — copy it before closing.
restoreDialog.changeSummaryPlaceholder: Why are you restoring? Visible in history.

projectWorkspaceDetail.notFound: Workspace not found for this project.
projectWorkspaceDetail.primaryNotice: This is the project’s primary codebase workspace.
projectWorkspaceDetail.intro: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.

hint.setupCommand: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
hint.cleanupCommand: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
hint.workspaceCommandsJson: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.

advancedRuntime.title: Advanced runtime JSON
advancedRuntime.description: Paperclip derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.

commands.title: Services and jobs
commands.description: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
commands.noServicesStarted: No services have been started for this workspace yet.
commands.noConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this workspace yet.
commands.noJobs: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
commands.disabledHint: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
